item.title: games\Adventure Owl Meets the MoleMen
item.description: A 2D adventure platformer for the web. Made in 72 hours for Ludum Dare 38, with Phaser, WebGl, and more.
item.author: dfharwell@gmail.com (Drew Harwell)

item.title: React Components are the New Jquery plugins
item.description: Remember jQuery plugins? I do. They used to be the cool way to implement everything in javascript. The even pop up in StackOverflow answers for things like "how do I sort an array".
item.author: dfharwell@gmail.com (Drew Harwell)

item.title: The Worst Web Design Trends of 2016
item.description: In 2015 we had Parallax scrolling. Okay, parallax scrolling still exists, but I think most people agree it's tacky and overused. Let's move on.
item.author: dfharwell@gmail.com (Drew Harwell)

item.title: Risks of Opaque Machine Learning
item.description: Many science fiction writers have written about how an AI can go rogue, typically in self-preservation. Stories like Terminator or The Matrix. Fortunately today, there is very little risk of an AI taking over the world, but there are ethical dilemmas that need to be considered when we work with Machine Learning.
item.author: dfharwell@gmail.com (Drew Harwell)
